name: Harry Potter and the Cursed Child
The Cheesemonger Invitational 2026
description: The Cheesemonger Invitational (CMI) is the ultimate celebration of cheese a truly unique event that unites industry insiders, passionate cheesemongers, and cheese enthusiasts for an unforgettable experience. Often hailed as the "Olympics of Cheesemongering," CMI showcases the finest cheesemongers in the field, who compete in a thrilling live finale that challenges their skill, knowledge, and creativity with cheese. And did we mention it is all you can eat cheese???
